tests.test_current_day_conditions module

tests.test_current_day_conditions.test_calculate_solar_declination_radians(day_number: int) → None

Tests the calculation of solar declination radians is as expected

tests.test_current_day_conditions.test_current_weather_snowfall(snow_fall: int, rainfall: int, actual: CurrentDayConditions) → None

Tests that precipitation falls either as snow or rain correctly.

tests.test_current_day_conditions.test_determine_daylength(day_number: int, geographic_latitude: float, is_winter: bool, polar_location: bool, northern_hemisphere: bool, expected: float, year: int) → None

Tests that correct day length were returned by the corresponding month
